question: Develop a C++ program that asks the user to input a number representing a day of the week (1 for Monday, 2 for Tuesday, etc.). Use a `switch` statement to print the corresponding day name.

test_cases.expected: Enter a number representing the day of the week (1 for Monday, 2 for Tuesday, etc.): Monday
Enter a number representing the day of the week (1 for Monday, 2 for Tuesday, etc.): Tuesday
Enter a number representing the day of the week (1 for Monday, 2 for Tuesday, etc.): Wednesday
Enter a number representing the day of the week (1 for Monday, 2 for Tuesday, etc.): Thursday
Enter a number representing the day of the week (1 for Monday, 2 for Tuesday, etc.): Friday
Enter a number representing the day of the week (1 for Monday, 2 for Tuesday, etc.): Saturday
Enter a number representing the day of the week (1 for Monday, 2 for Tuesday, etc.): Sunday
Enter a number representing the day of the week (1 for Monday, 2 for Tuesday, etc.): Invalid input. Please enter a number between 1 and 7.
Enter a number representing the day of the week (1 for Monday, 2 for Tuesday, etc.): Invalid input. Please enter a number between 1 and 7.
